name: Air Max/Solo 2 - Mouthpiece cap set (4 pieces)

description: Official replacement set for Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2 devices. * Please note these stems does not fit the Arizer ARGO vaporiser stem. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
